noticias.titulo: Eurizon Capital SGR S.p.A. Acquires Shares of 736,872 Itau Unibanco Holding S.A. $ITUB
noticias.resumo: Eurizon Capital SGR S.p.A. has acquired 736,872 shares of Itau Unibanco Holding S.A. (NYSE:ITUB) worth approximately $5.28 million during the fourth quarter. This acquisition comes as Itau Unibanco missed its Q4 earnings and revenue estimates, reporting EPS of $0.20 against an expected $0.22, and revenue of $9.01 billion versus an anticipated $9.41 billion. Despite the misses, analysts currently rate the stock a "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $9.00, and the company recently declared a special dividend of $0.068 per share.

noticias.titulo: Itaú Unibanco Formalizes Executive Removal in May 28 Board Meeting
noticias.resumo: Itaú Unibanco (ITUB) formalized the removal of executive Luís Eduardo Gross Siqueira Cunha, effective March 31, 2026, during a May 28, 2026 board meeting. The decision was reported in a Form 6-K filing with the U.S. SEC, indicating a change in the bank's executive lineup. Analysts maintain a "Buy" rating on ITUB with a $9.00 price target, while TipRanks' AI analyst, Spark, rates it as "Neutral" due to financial performance and earnings outlook balanced against technical momentum and financial risks.

noticias.titulo: Itaú Unibanco Board Approves Interest on Capital Distribution on May 28, 2026
noticias.resumo: Itaú Unibanco's board of directors approved the distribution of interest on capital to shareholders, to be paid by August 31, 2026. This distribution will amount to R$0.36188 per share gross, or R$0.298551 net, with the credit recorded on June 29, 2026, for shareholders of record as of June 18, 2026. Analysts currently rate ITUB as a Buy with a $9.00 price target, supported by solid financials and an attractive valuation, despite some technical and financial risks.

noticias.titulo: Understanding the Setup: (ITUB) and Scalable Risk
noticias.resumo: This article analyzes Itau Unibanco Banco Holding Sa (ITUB) using AI models, identifying divergent sentiment and elevated downside risk. It presents three institutional trading strategies—Position Trading, Momentum Breakout, and Risk Hedging—with specific entry, target, and stop-loss levels. The analysis also includes multi-timeframe signal strengths, support, and resistance levels for near-term, mid-term, and long-term horizons.

noticias.titulo: Employees Retirement System of Texas Decreases Stock Holdings in Itau Unibanco Holding S.A. $ITUB
noticias.resumo: The Employees Retirement System of Texas reduced its stake in Itau Unibanco Holding S.A. (NYSE:ITUB) by 49.4% in the fourth quarter, selling over 361,000 shares. Meanwhile, other institutional investors, including Goldman Sachs and Royal Bank of Canada, increased their holdings in the Brazilian bank. Analyst sentiment for ITUB is mixed, with a consensus of "Moderate Buy" and an average price target of $9.00.
